method: deterministic Python/sqlite3/regex classification; no paid model or API calls
privacy_boundary: No raw message text is included in the public repo package. Local detailed ledgers contain hashes/pointers/categories only.
limitations: Flattened export lacks native ChatGPT mapping/system/tool metadata.
Rule-based mapping is deterministic and exhaustive over candidate messages, but semantic edge cases remain reviewable rather than falsely closed.
